functional_purpose: Receives DICOM instances, derives routing metadata from the calling and called AETs, and submits each instance to the OpenEyes PayloadProcessor. Compatible Zeiss IOLMaster instances are also written to the local IOLMaster input folder.
business_process: Ingest imaging and route supported IOLMaster biometry for import.

destination_connectors.name: Write out file to IolMasterImport incoming folder when device is a Zeiss IOLMaster

ack_behaviour: DICOM listener auto-generates its response after source transformation and responds after processing.
main_filters: No source filter; IOLMaster file destination is removed unless manufacturer is Zeiss, model contains IOLMaster, and SOP Class UID is supported.
main_transformer_stages: Read local and remote AET values.
Derive identifier type and institution ID from the local AET or configurationMap defaultPatientIdentifierType.
Set source_platform from ImageNet or Forum AET hints.
Extract DICOM header fields and remove the IOLMaster destination when not compatible.
error_handling: No destination queueing or configured destination retries.
queue_behaviour: Source buffer size is 1000; destination queues are disabled.
logging: No explicit logging steps are configured; DICOM content and attachments are stored.

evidence.claim: Bedford channel c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b receives DICOM on port 11112 and posts application/dicom with request_type dicom_request to /api/v1/request/queue/add using preemptive HTTP Basic authentication.
evidence.location: Bedford, DICOM, c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/DICOM.xml: sourceConnector DICOM Listener and destination PayloadProcessor API Send

evidence.claim: The source transformer reads configurationMap defaultPatientIdentifierType, and the IOLMaster destination selection checks Zeiss manufacturer, IOLMaster model, and supported SOP Class UIDs before writing to /mnt/dicom.
evidence.location: Bedford, DICOM, c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/DICOM.xml: source transformer Extract identifier_type and institution_id from Local AET; response transformer remove first destination if type is not compatible; File Writer destination

functional_purpose: Polls a local document directory and transfers each non-Internal raw file to an SFTP document inbox.
business_process: Operational delivery of documents to an external document service.
main_filters: File Reader regex excludes names containing Internal.
main_transformer_stages: Pass raw binary source file through unchanged to SFTP using originalFilename.
retry_behaviour: SFTP destination retryCount is 3 at 10000 ms intervals.
queue_behaviour: Destination queue is disabled; source buffer size is 1000.
logging: No explicit logging steps are configured; message content and attachments are stored.

evidence.claim: Bedford channel 375fe7b2-d55c-4c60-b66f-dc2000c8ea95 polls /mnt/docman for raw files excluding Internal, deletes successfully processed source files, and moves errors to /mnt/docman/error.
evidence.location: Bedford, Document OUT, 375fe7b2-d55c-4c60-b66f-dc2000c8ea95, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/Document OUT.xml: sourceConnector File Reader

evidence.claim: Its SFTP File Writer sends message.rawData using originalFilename, with queue disabled and three retries at 10000 ms; the endpoint credentials are redacted.
evidence.location: Bedford, Document OUT, 375fe7b2-d55c-4c60-b66f-dc2000c8ea95, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/Document OUT.xml: destination SFTP

functional_purpose: Reads supported document files from a local drop folder, parses document metadata from an eight-part filename, and submits the binary document as a document_upload_request to the PayloadProcessor.
business_process: Ingest externally supplied clinical documents into OpenEyes document processing.
main_filters: Accepts only pdf, jpg, jpeg, png, gif, mp4, mpeg4, ogg, webm, or mov files with an eight-part double-underscore filename.
main_transformer_stages: Split originalFilename into identifier, patient, firm, subtype, laterality, unique reference, date, and filename.
Derive MIME type from the filename extension.
error_handling: Moves read errors to /mnt/document-upload/error and moves processed files to /mnt/document-upload/processed.
queue_behaviour: Destination queue is disabled; source buffer size is 1000.
logging: No explicit logging steps are configured; stored metadata includes patient ID, filename, unique reference, and validation error, creating a PII-in-log risk.

evidence.claim: Bedford channel f703f9cd-a6ee-42e6-8550-c6a9c3fb1c73 reads supported binary document types from /mnt/document-upload, moves successful files to processed and read errors to error, and filters for exactly eight double-underscore filename parts.
evidence.location: Bedford, Document Upload PP, f703f9cd-a6ee-42e6-8550-c6a9c3fb1c73, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/Document Upload PP.xml: sourceConnector File Reader; filter File Format

evidence.claim: The source transformer extracts filename metadata and MIME type, then the HTTP Sender posts binary content as request_type document_upload_request to /api/v1/request/queue/add with preemptive HTTP Basic authentication and no destination retry or queue.
evidence.location: Bedford, Document Upload PP, f703f9cd-a6ee-42e6-8550-c6a9c3fb1c73, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/Document Upload PP.xml: source transformer mapper steps and mime_type; destination PayloadProcessor API Send

functional_purpose: Receives inbound HL7v2 messages by MLLP and selectively updates OpenEyes patient, appointment, and patient-merge resources through PASAPI.
business_process: Synchronize patient demographics, appointments, and patient merges from the PAS into OpenEyes.
ack_behaviour: MLLP listener auto-generates its response before processing; configured HL7 acknowledgements are AA, AE, or AR.
main_transformer_stages: Normalize doubled quotes in the inbound HL7 XML representation.
Create PASAPI patient XML and map hospital number, visit, clinic, doctor, status, and NHS number values.
Build PatientAppointment XML and PatientMerge XML for filtered destinations.
error_handling: No configured destination queueing or application retries.
queue_behaviour: Source buffer size is 1000 and HTTP destination queues are disabled.
logging: No explicit logging steps are configured; channel metadata stores source and type.

evidence.claim: Bedford channel d69815ee-68d1-4dcb-8896-8b12ba06a9c4 is an MLLP TCP Listener on port 6661 with HL7v2 data and auto-generated pre-processing acknowledgements; its configured response codes are AA, AE, and AR.
evidence.location: Bedford, PAS IN, d69815ee-68d1-4dcb-8896-8b12ba06a9c4, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/PAS IN.xml: sourceConnector TCP Listener and HL7v2 responseGenerationProperties

evidence.claim: Enabled HTTP destinations PUT to PASAPI V2 Patient, V2 PatientAppointment, and V1 PatientMerge endpoints using preemptive HTTP Basic authentication; filters explicitly select A40 for the merge and exclude M05 from the patient destination.
evidence.location: Bedford, PAS IN, d69815ee-68d1-4dcb-8896-8b12ba06a9c4, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/PAS IN.xml: destinations PASAPI - Secondary Patient, PASAPI - Patient, Clinic List - PUT, PASAPI - Patient Merge and their filters

functional_purpose: Accepts HTTP requests, converts either a patient identifier lookup to QBP^Q21 or supplied XML to an ADT message, sends the message to the remote PAS by MLLP, and returns an XML patient-list response when available.
business_process: Support OpenEyes-initiated PAS demographic queries and PAS status updates.
ack_behaviour: The HTTP source responds after processing with destination d6; the Respond JavaScript Writer returns TransformedResponse or an empty PatientList element.
main_filters: Send Q21 requires PV1.3.2 or QPD.3, or an A03 message trigger.
main_transformer_stages: Set MSH timestamp and message ID.
Map hosnum or nhsnum to QPD.3.
Convert supplied XML request data to ADT segments and map location status values, otherwise create QBP^Q21.
Convert returned K21 data to XML and form the HTTP response.
error_handling: If no transformed response exists, returns an empty PatientList element; no destination queueing is configured.
retry_behaviour: TCP Sender retryCount is 0; MLLP transport maxRetries is 2.
queue_behaviour: Source buffer size is 1000 and all destinations have queues disabled.
logging: Transformer logs segment indexes, request JSON, location validation failures, and DG1 data, creating a PII-in-log risk.

evidence.claim: Bedford channel 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c listens for XML HTTP requests on port 6663 without HTTP authentication, builds QBP^Q21 when xmlrequest is absent, and otherwise builds ADT content from supplied XML.
evidence.location: Bedford, PAS OUT, 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/PAS OUT.xml: sourceConnector HTTP Listener and source transformer Set Message Type and data

evidence.claim: The Send Q21 TCP Sender uses MLLP to a remote address on port 8027 and filters for populated PV1.3.2 or QPD.3 or trigger A03; the Respond JavaScript Writer returns TransformedResponse or <PatientList/>.
evidence.location: Bedford, PAS OUT, 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c, Bedford/Default Group.xml, canonical/Bedford/PAS OUT.xml: destination Send Q21 filter and TCP Sender; destination Respond JavaScript Writer
